title: Implement P1 codegen planning lanes

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement P1 codegen lanes #1008, #1004, #1003, #999, and #972 under parent #892.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope to P1 codegen completion issues; do not close #892 parent or implement lower-priority/codegen-extraction lanes.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Decide whether stale child issues are superseded, but document the decision under each GitHub issue and validate generated artifacts.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A fix requires changing non-P1 lanes, broad command-generation extraction, or parent #892 completion semantics.
canonical_core.next_action: Publish the PR and monitor CI.
proof_expectations: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: #1003: workspace defaults payload truth is externalized to src/agentic_workspace/contracts/workspace_defaults/payload.json and copied into generated/workspace/python/_contracts/payload.json; generated workspace defaults load from generated resources instead of importing the source defaults loader.

#1008: memory status text, JSON, and verbose-compatible output execute through generated operation IR using payload.status; the generated memory runtime no longer exposes _load_memory_bootstrap_status.
#1004: generated memory list file/skill projections resolve only generated _payload/_skills roots, with source package paths retained only as resource-copy sources.
#972: shipped-source executable proof uses AST behavior detection instead of literal keyword matching, with a regression test for prose keyword false positives.
#999: defaults text/json routes remain verified and the tiny defaults router no longer loads the full defaults prose by default.
#892 remains open as the parent Python completion/codegen epic; this P1 lane is complete and documented under child issues and parent issue.

execution_run.executor: Codex with reusable Spark exploration subagent
execution_run.what happened: Implemented generated-resource workspace defaults, retired generated memory status source fallback, removed generated memory list source fallback candidates, tightened AST behavior proof, and kept compact-answer source helpers for remaining source consumers.
execution_run.changed surfaces: command package IR/contracts, generated workspace/memory packages, checker/tests, workspace defaults source payload storage, planning execplan/state
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_adapters.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python packages/command-generation/tests/primitive_conformance.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_workspace_defaults_cli.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run agentic-memory status --target .; uv run agentic-memory status --target . --verbose --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: P1 child lane ready for PR; #892 remains open for remaining codegen epic work.
execution_run.next step: Document under issues, commit, push, create PR, and watch CI.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Source compact-answer helpers are shared by defaults/proof/ownership/report selectors and must not be deleted when extracting the defaults payload.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Prevents broad payload extraction from breaking source-owned selector surfaces.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: If compact-answer helper ownership changes again, move it behind a smaller shared runtime utility.

task_intent_promotion.proposed durable intent: Prevents broad payload extraction from breaking source-owned selector surfaces.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The P1 child lane is complete, but #892 is the parent epic and still owns remaining non-P1/codegen-extraction work.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Generated package proof, primitive conformance, contract tooling, defaults tests, and memory/defaults smoke commands passed locally.
closure_check.reopen trigger: CI failure, PR review comment, or evidence that a P1 child still depends on source fallback behavior.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, report AW smoothness/helpfulness gaps, better-way signals, unused-feature reflections, and places AW could help more. Route each concrete signal to exactly one owner class unless explicitly split, or mark no_signal_found after checking.
signals found: AW implement reported “Create or promote an active execplan” even while the active execplan existed; the real missing item was a delegation decision.
The reusable-worker result arrived after local implementation had started, making it useful but not smoothly synchronized with the orchestrator loop.
signals routed: Report lesser dogfooding findings in final/issue comments; no new issue requested.
signals dismissed: Generic reuse-pressure duplicate helper hints were not actionable for this generated/test-heavy slice.
